## Summary

## Validation
- [ ] `flutter pub get`
- [ ] `flutter analyze --no-fatal-infos`
- [ ] `flutter test`

## Versioning And Docs
- [ ] `pubspec.yaml` version/build reviewed
- [ ] `VERSION` appended if release-impacting
- [ ] local knowledgebase note updated if needed
- [ ] shared docs engine in the web repo updated if parity or shared behavior changed

## Config / Backend Impact
- [ ] no local-only Firebase or signing files staged
- [ ] backend URL or API contract changes documented
- [ ] social auth / Stripe / Agora impacts called out
